## Feature

Describe the feature.

## Why It Matters

Explain why this improves the project.

## User Flow

How should the user use it?

## Technical Notes

Mention possible files or modules involved.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Feature works locally
- [ ] Tests pass
- [ ] README or docs are updated if needed
